reviews.title: Incorrect amount claim
reviews.text: Until check-out, all the staff were friendly and there were no problems. Strangely, a day after check-out, I received a charge of $150 from the hotel, and when I sent an email for clarification, they sent me a receipt stating it was for bathroom room damage. On the day of check-out, I took a shower and left the room clean without any issues, and the hotel said nothing until I left after check-out. Also, when I returned to the front desk that night to retrieve my luggage, there was still no mention of any damage, so I went home. It was strange to receive a charge for room damage the day after check-out, and they even sent me an email without confirming whether I was male or female, and the receipt had my address listed incorrectly. Since I have never damaged any hotel property or facilities, I requested evidence if there was any proof that I had damaged hotel property, and while waiting for a response, I requested evidence again and received a reply two days later that it was a hotel error and they would invalidate the charge for room damage. I had used the hotel trusting it would be a pleasant experience since it is operated by Hilton, but it ended on a very negative note. I had enjoyed good service and facilities, but now it will remain a hotel I would not want to use again, so I am leaving this review. I hope others can take this into consideration and do not experience any inconvenience.
reviews.room_type: CITY VIEW-1 K-HEAR/MOBILITY ACCESS W/RI SHWR

reviews.title: bad
reviews.positives: i had bad expThis is the second time I have stayed in your hotel, and the first experience was beautiful, so I returned the experience for my honeymoon, but it was one of the worst experiences for me in my entire life. I arrived at the hotel and it was time for me to sleep, and the suite was not ready to host it, as the lighting control device was not working and the lighting was on. A technician came to me and fixed the errors when It went and damaged the blackout and the curtains. I could not sleep. The second time I tested the lights at 3:30 a.m., they turned on and turned off suddenly without control. Even if there was a leak in the bathroom, they did not fix it for me. In the end, the Valet car on the second day waited ten minutes for the car to be delivered, and this will be the last time. I will visit your hotel, thank you

reviews.title: Even With Excellent Service, Redesigned Luxury in this Old Mandarin Oriental Doesn't Always Add Up
reviews.positives: This is the old Las Vegas Mandarin Oriental that Hilton bought and transformed into a Waldorf. While I'm not sure why they changed so much of the hotel's layout, it is still quiet luxury with excellent service in a non-gaming hotel on the Strip.
reviews.negatives: Hilton turned this old 5 star Mandarin Oriental upside down, not always successfully. The Mandarin's 23 Floor Sky Lobby was truly spectacular but now they've turned the first floor into the Waldorf Astoria lobby. Boring. You now have to change elevators on the 3rd floor where the cafe is, following cheap looking signs, to get to your room. It all feels like they knew they "had to do something to make it different" but now it just feels like an impersonal 5 star money making machine. Go here, go there, but with no real function or style. The 23rd floor is now home to several bars and restaurants that aren't always open. The restaurant Twist is gone, and is now an empty event space. They kept some of the spectacular Asian design from the Mandarin Oriental (thank goodness), and have integrated their more conservative Waldorf Astoria brand style with okay results. That said, the best parts of this hotel are the leftovers from the Mandarin Oriental that truly spent an incredible amount of money on top design, function and style.

reviews.title: Lux quiet home away from home
reviews.text: It is serene and cozy previous Mandarin Oriental, love the decor and style in the room. Friendly front desk and helpful staff, especially the guy serving during 3/8 evening in 11th floor for our 3 rooms. Very nice and courteous.

reviews.title: Pay a premium price for less than a premium experience.
reviews.negatives: Not fully open. Pool bar closed. No lobby or cocktail bar open during the afternoon.

reviews.title: Great place to stay in Vegas
reviews.text: Waldorf Astoria obviously has a promising name, and it's still a great hotel. Very stylish, with lots of attention to detail. Some of the services that I believe they offer were not yet available shortly after Covid but still the service and friendliness of the staff was great. I wouldn't recommend it for younger folks as it lacks the "party vibe" of other hotels on the strip, the audience is certainly older and. more settled. Still, if you want a more quiet, stylish place with great service, The WA is a great choice.

reviews.title: Stay was nice but disappointing in the quality of the room.
reviews.positives: The staff were quite nice and attentive and I love the location of the property.
reviews.negatives: My complaint was the quality of the room. Furniture and TV were outdated. The credenza of the TV where the minibar is located had doors falling off as well as in the closet area. Headboards are dated. Just expected more — especially after you see the beautiful remodeled lobby.

reviews.title: Nice & Clean - Location is Prefect.

reviews.title: 5 star stay!
reviews.text: The Waldorf Astoria lived up to its name! Service was immaculate. Hotel was clean and tidy.  Room was kept tidy with service twice a day. Middle of the strip great location.  Quiet and serene atmosphere away from the craziness of Vegas, it really felt like "going home" on my week stay at the Waldorf.  The bellmen were very helpful, the house car driver was knowledgeable and sincere, the pool staff were professional and is there for anything you need.  A non smoking facility it does not have the smell of the casino hotels.  The furniture in the room showed a little wear, but still clean.  They will be going through a full renovation soon as the current decor is left over from the Mandarin.  I'll be looking to return once that is complete, or sooner!

reviews.title: Allez ailleurs, pour le même prix vous trouverez largement mieux
reviews.positives: La suite et la chambre très spacieuses
reviews.negatives:
Ayant 3 enfants dont un de 3 ans et demi j’avais réservé une chambre et une suite communicantes. 
J’avais fait cette réservation de 1450 $ 6 mois avant et ce critère avait été déterminant dans mon choix. 
A notre arrivée on me dit que l’hôtel est complet et qu’on ne peut me donner ce que j’ai demandé. 
Et pour excuse on me dit que c’est la faute de Booking qui mélange les réservations. 
En attendant c’est moi qui paye et qui n’ai pas ce que je demande. 
Ensuite la chambre de mes enfants n’est pas non plus ce que j’ai réservé et là on me dit que cette chambre n’existe pas, photos à l’appui. 
Peut-être la faute à Booking là aussi ?
Nous montons dans nos chambres et franchement la propreté n’y était pas vu le prix : poussière partout, papier par terre derrière les portes. 
Bref on attend autre chose d’un hôtel soit disant luxueux et les prestations n’y sont pas

reviews.negatives:
Kenne das Hotel seit über 20 Jahren, vormals Mandarin Oriental. Jetzt eher 3 Sterne Hotel:
Kein Room Service am Nachmittag und auch sonst keine Möglichkeit etwas zu essen zu bekommen. 
Desinfektionstücher im Gym gibt es nicht mehr.

reviews.title: Wäre wir am ersten Abend in eine funtkionierende Umgebung gekommen, wäre alles ok gewesen.
reviews.positives: Der Außenpool ist hervorragend und die Möglichkeit ein Frühstück on the go zu bekommen sind besonders zu erwähnen.
reviews.negatives: Man hat uns ganz bewusst eine nicht vermietbare Suite gegeben, da das Hotel überbucht war. Das fiel leider extrem am nächsten Morgen auf, als ich mich an der Rezeption beschwerte. Alle Abflüsse im Bad waren verstopft, so das unser Geschäft im Klo verblieb und die Schüssel überlief. Das Duschwasser blieb in der Dusche und zu allem Übel kroch aus dem Badewannenabluss eine stinkende Fäkalienbrühe. So hatte ich mir den Aufenthalt in dem"besten" Hotel am Ort nicht vorgstellt. Leider gab es für diesen Vorfall weder eine angemessene Entschuldigung noch einen nennenswerten Nachlass.

konieczność zmiany wind- to jest idiotyczne i uciążliwe bo za każdym razem trzeba tracić czas - nie ma bezpośredniej windy do pokojów. Brzydki jest obszar przejścia na 3 -m pietrze jak w 2-star hotel. to bardzo pogarsza wizerunek hotelu i komfort gości.
Na basenie brak parawanów i strasznie wiatr wieje - tak bardzo przeszkadza ze uciekłem natychmiast - nie ma się gdzie schować przed tym przeciągiem.
herbaty mimo czajnika w pokoju trzeba było zamawiać u hauskeeping aby donieśli.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Jeg havde booket med morgenmad, men skulle betale for den i restauranten, hvilket ikke er okay når man betaler så mange penge for et ophold

reviews.title: Very rude front of staff
reviews.negatives: Staff was extremely rude. Daily hold charge on the card was extremely ambiguous but the staff was too rude to explain. Horrible experience and totally spoilt the WA brand

reviews.title: It was very boring on New Year's Eve at the hotel, we had to leave for another hotel... unfortunately
reviews.positives: the price does not correspond to the hotel, the New Year's mood was not in the hotel, it was very modest, there was strictly no New Year's music in the lobby, minimal interior... the price did not correspond

reviews.negatives: The breakfast was extremely bad value for money.

reviews.title: I paid a lot of money for the stay but the staff were very rude and unhelpful
reviews.positives: The amenities
reviews.negatives:
The staff
They were unhelpful and rude

reviews.title: uncomfortable, sleepless, not happy
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: the bed was soft and provided little support

reviews.title: Disappointing. The location good. However, would have expected some credit for issues incurred.
reviews.positives: Pool staff nice, friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: On arrival was told we were to be in room next door to friends. Unfortunately this was not the case. Safe did not work and was repaired in afternoon while I was in room. Wasted 4 hours of my day. My room was not cleaned on second day. Water not replaced etc. I was then charged tax which I had already paid in advance and charged parking fee for car which I was told would be waived due to safe issue. Beyond that had no replenishment of water, tea in room and had to ask room service for hangers for clothes. Most disappointing. On check out Dianna the desk clerk stated I would receive credit for the issues incurred but this not the case. Told me the breakfast cost had been waived. However, I had already paid this in advance. To sum up. Very poor service.

reviews.title: Disappointing again
reviews.positives: It’s a nice hotel and great location and new entrance is nice
reviews.negatives: The service. This is the 4th time I have stayed here and I’m always making excuses for them. It’s almost like it’s a privilege for me to stay there and I’m inconveniencing them too much. Couldn’t extend my booking and reception was unhelpful. Main guy in reception wouldn’t allow my Starbucks delivery in and just a general snobby attitude. I’ve cancelled my next stay which was in 2 weeks for another concert and I also spent the extra day at the aria which was really nice

reviews.title: This Waldorf unit does not really meet the standards of their other units (e.g. in Dubai)
reviews.positives: Well located, not overcrowded
reviews.negatives: The room (bathroom) was not really clean

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Construction works ongoing. Restaurants closed for quite some days of the week.

reviews.title: Good location, nice bed.
reviews.positives: You will sleep very well in the bed.
reviews.negatives:
I had an issue with my flight to Las Vegas and the hotel people didn't want to ensure my booking of 4 days is still available when I arrive the next day due to connection miss.
The room is nice, but has a set of flaws compared to the advertisement. For the related price there are better options in LAS.

reviews.title: For the price I would try elsewhere
reviews.positives: Loved the quality of the robe and the bathroom products.
reviews.negatives: The hotel smelled bad. The room was not as nice as the lobby. Slightly dated, was hoping for more.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Helpfull staff
Modernity of the equipment
reviews.negatives:
We specifically picked the hotel for the room layout. However, it was not the same as advertised on Booking's app & Waldorf's website. Even after requesting, prior our stay, to have a room matching the picture depiction, we still ended up in a different room than expected. 

Pricy parking ($96, taxes &fees included for 24h)

reviews.title: Very good as expected with a small issue.
reviews.positives: The hotel is clean and up to the standard expected. The facilites are excellent and the bars and restaurants are good.
reviews.negatives: Check in - Took 2-3 hours to get the bags to the room and the delay was unacceptable. A complaint was made to the management and a bar credit was applied, but the overall service in this area was poor.

reviews.title: Fun and luxurious stay on the Vegas strip
reviews.positives: Well located. Comfortable. Excellent staff.
reviews.negatives: Expensive. Bar and iconic reception area on 23rd floor closed.

reviews.title: Definitly a good hotel but we were there at the wrong time!
reviews.positives: I would say this is one of the best and most affordable hotels in Las Vegas. Especially as a family and non smoker this was the right hotel to choose. In my perspective its a huge plus that the hotel doesn’t have a Casino, its more quiet and doesn’t smell as bad. The Waldorf Astoria is one of the newer hotel in the area and worth its money when you compare it with the old hug hotels around.(MGM/ Caesar Palace).  The view and room of the hotel were amazing. The bathtub was stunning!
reviews.negatives: The service for a five star hotel was not as expected. I would say it was bad but they could be more friendly and attentive. At the time we were there they renovated the Lobby and we had to take a 5 min walk to get to the upper lobby and to our room. I hope that will change when they are done renovating.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location and View
reviews.negatives: House Keeping can improve

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location and good value for money
reviews.negatives: House Keeping can improve

reviews.title: Great hotel and great location for our family of 6.
reviews.positives: Great location. Calm and clean away from the busy strip.
reviews.negatives: They didn’t give us a room on a higher floor because of the maintenance on the higher floors which I thought was quite inconvenient. Considering I made these requests a while in advance.

reviews.title: A great hotel that isnt a casino.
reviews.positives: We chose this hotel because we didnt want to stay in a casino hotel.  This is a great hotel.  The room was very comfortable and clean.  The pool is great with plenty of sun lounges and drink service.  The staff are great.  The hotel is located on the Strip and well located.  It is very easy to get a taxi/uber as they pull into the hotel entrance and there are always staff there to help you.

reviews.title: Everything Perfect, will come back again
reviews.positives: Kumarhane yok, gürültü yok huzur
reviews.negatives: Yok

reviews.title: Great place. Has improved a lot since our last visit in 2022
reviews.positives: Breakfast was fantastic at the Zen Cafe.
reviews.negatives: There is no ice machine. But you can request ice.

reviews.title: Ist class hotel
reviews.positives:
Centrally located but has no casino and no attractions, so no passing footfall, hence quiet. 
Staff all attentive and professional.  2 swimming pools with lots of lounges and umbrellas. 
Excellent Zen cafe for quick coffee and pastry for breakfast if full breakfast is not required. 
Bar with excellent views, especially at night.
Luggage lockup with facilities to shower and change if already checked out.
Had a road trip from San Francisco down to L.A. and then to Vegas staying at 7 different hotels. Waldorf by far, the best hotel. Hotel thought of everything.
reviews.negatives: It's a bit expensive, but you get what you pay for!

reviews.title: Awesome choice for those looking for quality over quantity
reviews.positives: No casino!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very nice, very comfortable, very spacious, very clean hotel room
reviews.positives: Very clean, very stylish nice hotel, and very close to the MGM where I went to see usher in concert
reviews.negatives: The only thing I didn’t like was the view I was on the fifth floor view of other buildings was very good
